robot_capabilities.drone: Performs aerial inspection, mapping, monitoring, and lightweight tool delivery.
robot_capabilities.robot_dog_with_arm: Traverses rough terrain and manipulates tools or heavy materials using robotic arm.
robot_capabilities.differential_drive_robot_with_arm: Handles precise manipulation and material transport on flat terrain.
robot_capabilities.tower_crane_robot: Lifts and transports extremely heavy construction materials vertically and horizontally.
robot_capabilities.autonomous_dump_truck: Carries sand, gravel, debris, and bulk materials across construction zones.
robot_capabilities.concrete_pouring_robot: Automates concrete pouring and leveling operations.
robot_capabilities.wall_painting_robot: Paints interior and exterior walls autonomously.
robot_capabilities.welding_robot: Performs welding of steel structures and support frames.
robot_capabilities.excavator_robot: Excavates foundations, trenches, and clears debris.
robot_capabilities.inspection_humanoid_robot: Performs safety inspections, reads control panels, and interacts with workers.
robot_capabilities.bricklaying_robot: Automatically places and aligns bricks for wall construction.
robot_capabilities.rebar_tying_robot: Detects and ties reinforcement bars for concrete structures.
robot_capabilities.glass_installation_robot: Installs glass panels and aligns facade structures safely.
robot_capabilities.roof_inspection_drone: Inspects roofs, elevated platforms, and detects structural defects.
robot_capabilities.cement_transport_robot: Carries cement bags and supplies between storage and work zones.
robot_capabilities.forklift_robot: Lifts and transports palletized construction materials.
robot_capabilities.scaffolding_assembly_robot: Assists in assembling and stabilizing scaffolding structures.
robot_capabilities.pipe_installation_robot: Places and aligns plumbing pipes in building infrastructure.
robot_capabilities.electrical_wiring_robot: Routes electrical cables and assists in wiring installation.
robot_capabilities.floor_cleaning_robot: Cleans debris, dust, and loose materials from work areas.
robot_capabilities.material_sorting_robot: Sorts construction materials, tools, and reusable debris.
robot_capabilities.demolition_robot: Breaks walls, removes damaged structures, and clears hazardous debris.
robot_capabilities.tile_installation_robot: Places and aligns floor and wall tiles precisely.
robot_capabilities.window_cleaning_robot: Cleans high-rise windows and glass surfaces.
robot_capabilities.safety_monitoring_robot: Monitors worker safety, detects hazards, and issues alerts.

robot_morphology.drone: Quadrotor aerial robot, payload 4 kg, flight endurance 25 min.
robot_morphology.robot_dog_with_arm: Quadruped robot with robotic arm and rough terrain locomotion.
robot_morphology.differential_drive_robot_with_arm: Differential drive mobile manipulator for flat terrain.
robot_morphology.tower_crane_robot: Fixed heavy-duty crane system with 1000 kg lifting capacity.
robot_morphology.autonomous_dump_truck: Heavy-duty wheeled transport vehicle for construction materials.
robot_morphology.concrete_pouring_robot: Tracked robot with concrete dispensing arm.
robot_morphology.excavator_robot: Tracked excavation vehicle with digging bucket.
robot_morphology.rebar_tying_robot: Compact robotic arm system for reinforcement work.
robot_morphology.forklift_robot: Autonomous forklift system with pallet handling.
robot_morphology.scaffolding_assembly_robot: Mobile robotic system with scaffold alignment tools.
robot_morphology.pipe_installation_robot: Tracked manipulator robot for pipe placement.
robot_morphology.electrical_wiring_robot: Compact robot for cable routing and installation.
robot_morphology.material_sorting_robot: Sorting robot with conveyor and robotic arm.
robot_morphology.demolition_robot: Heavy-duty demolition platform with impact tools.
robot_morphology.safety_monitoring_robot: Mobile monitoring robot with cameras and sensors.

task_specific_rules: Heavy lifting tasks should only be assigned to crane, dump truck, or excavator robots.
Painting tasks must begin only after structural and concrete work is completed.
Welding tasks require nearby safety monitoring robots to remain active.
Fragile materials like glass must be handled only by glass installation robots.
Demolition robots must operate in isolated safety zones.
Electrical wiring should begin only after wall and structural inspections are complete.
task_replanning_rules: If a path becomes blocked, robots should dynamically reroute around debris or obstacles.
If drone flight becomes unsafe due to weather, assign inspection tasks to humanoid inspection robots.
If a heavy transport robot fails, redistribute payload across multiple smaller robots if feasible.
If worker safety risks are detected, all nearby robots must slow down or pause operations.
Idle robots should assist overloaded robots during critical construction phases.
If a robotic arm becomes unavailable, assign manipulation tasks to another compatible robot.
